description: The user hovers over various cells in the Agreement Matrix, triggering tooltips for different categories like 'Transaction History in Wallet' and 'Taxes in My Opportunities'.
frame_description: The user is viewing the Results tab of a card sorting study, specifically the Agreement Matrix section.

description: The user scrolls down the page to view more results, including the Similarity Matrix and Individual Responses.
frame_description: The page content moves upwards as the user scrolls down.

description: The user hovers over several questions in the left-hand sidebar, considering which one to select.
frame_description: The cursor moves vertically along the list of questions on the left side of the screen.

description: The user clicks on the question 'I would prefer my transaction history to show:' in the left sidebar.
interaction_target: I would prefer my transaction history to show:
frame_description: The user selects a specific question to view its detailed results.

description: The main content area updates to display the results for the selected multiple-choice question.
frame_description: The Agreement Matrix is replaced by a bar chart and a list of individual responses for the selected question.

description: The user hovers over the results chart and individual participant responses for the selected question.
frame_description: The user is reviewing the data for the 'transaction history' question.

description: The user hovers over the 'Delete' and 'Filter' icons in the header of the question results section.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the top right of the central results panel.

description: The user hovers over the 'Show Filter' icon in the right-hand sidebar.
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the filter icon on the far right of the screen.

description: The user clicks the 'Show Filter' button to open the filter options.
frame_description: The user activates the filter sidebar.

description: The filter sidebar updates to show active filters and the option to add more.
frame_description: The right sidebar content changes to show filter controls.

description: The user hovers over elements in the filter sidebar and then moves back to the main results area.
frame_description: The user explores the filter options before returning their attention to the data.

description: The user hovers over the 'Delete' icon in the question header again.
frame_description: The cursor briefly pauses over the trash can icon.

description: The user hovers over questions in the left sidebar, moving towards the bottom of the list.
frame_description: The user is looking for another question to analyze.

description: The user clicks on the question 'What other types of withdrawal methods would be desirable?' in the left sidebar.
interaction_target: What other types of withdrawal methods would be desirable?
frame_description: The user selects an open-ended question to view its results.

description: The main content area updates to show the results for the open-ended question, including an AI-generated summary.
frame_description: The previous results are replaced by a text-based summary and a list of participant answers.

description: The user reads the AI-generated summary and hovers over individual participant responses to the withdrawal methods question.
frame_description: The user is consuming the qualitative data for the selected question.
